versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   node-feature-discovery-0-18-3   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: node-feature-discovery
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: node-feature-discovery-0-18-3
      name: node-feature-discovery
      namespace: node-feature-discovery
